sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْيِي، الِاهْتِمَامُ بِالْحَيَوَانَاتِ يُعَلِّمُنَا الرَّحْمَةَ.
sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, briga o životinjama nas uči samilosti.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, caring for animals teaches us compassion.

sentences.arabic: الطِّفْلُ الَّذِي يُرَبِّي حَيَوَانًا يَتَعَلَّمُ الْمَسْؤُولِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Dijete koje uzgaja životinju uči odgovornost.
sentences.translationEn: A child who raises an animal learns responsibility.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا أَنْ نَعْتَنِيَ بِهَا وَلَا نُؤْذِيَهَا.
sentences.translation: Moramo se brinuti za njih i ne smijemo ih povrijediti.
sentences.translationEn: We must look after them and not harm them.
